title: Our Lady of Grace Church
tagline: Our Lady of Grace Church — spiritual town of Goa

heroImage.alt: Our Lady of Grace Church, Goa

overview.short: Our Lady of Grace Church is a Roman Catholic church in Chorão, Goa, India.
overview.description: Our Lady of Grace Church is a Roman Catholic church in Chorão, Goa, India. It is bounded on its north and west by the Mapusa River, with Salvador do Mundo remaining exactly opposite to it. To the south is the river Mandovi with Ribandar opposite to it and to its east is the St Bartholomew's Church.

topPlaces.name: Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão
topPlaces.description: Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão is a defunct Catholic seminary that was founded on 2 April 1761 in Chorão, Portuguese Goa. It belonged to the parish of Our Lady of Grace Church.

image.alt: Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão

topPlaces.name: Chapel of St. Jerome (Chorão Island)
topPlaces.description: The Chapel of St. Jerome is a historic Roman Catholic chapel on the island of Chorão in Goa, India.

topPlaces.name: Salim Ali Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Salim Ali Bird Sanctuary is an estuarine mangrove habitat, which is declared as the bird sanctuary, and located on western tip of the Island of Chorão along the Mandovi River, Goa, in India. The sanctuary is named after Salim Ali, the eminent Indian ornithologist.

topPlaces.name: Salvador do Mundo
topPlaces.description: Salvador do Mundo (Portuguese for Saviour of the World) is a village in Bardez taluka, Goa, in India. The village is located south west of Socorro and east of Porvorim.

topPlaces.name: Ribandar
topPlaces.description: Ribandar is a town in Tiswadi, Goa, located between the cities of Panjim (Nova Goa) and Old Goa (Velha Goa).

topPlaces.name: Epidemics in Chorão Island
topPlaces.description: The Chorão Epidemic killed over a thousand people in Chorão, an island along the Mandovi River near Ilhas, Goa, India. It also caused thousands to flee the island, and led to the closure of Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão in 1859.

topPlaces.name: Chorão (island)
topPlaces.description: Chorão (formerly known as Choddnnem) is an island along the Mandovi River near Tiswadi, Goa, India. It is the largest among other 17 islands of Goa.

topPlaces.name: St Bartholomew's Church (Chorão Island)
topPlaces.description: St Bartholomew's Church is a Roman Catholic church in Chorão, Goa, India. The Parish of St.

items.activity: Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão
items.note: Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão is a defunct Catholic seminary that was founded on 2 April 1761 in Chorão, Portuguese Goa. It belonged to the parish of Our Lady of Grace Church.
The Chapel of St. Jerome is a historic Roman Catholic chapel on the island of Chorão in Goa, India.

Salim Ali Bird Sanctuary is an estuarine mangrove habitat, which is declared as the bird sanctuary, and located on western tip of the Island of Chorão along the Mandovi River, Goa, in India. The sanctuary is named after Salim Ali, the eminent Indian ornithologist.
Salvador do Mundo (Portuguese for Saviour of the World) is a village in Bardez taluka, Goa, in India. The village is located south west of Socorro and east of Porvorim.
Ribandar is a town in Tiswadi, Goa, located between the cities of Panjim (Nova Goa) and Old Goa (Velha Goa).

The Chorão Epidemic killed over a thousand people in Chorão, an island along the Mandovi River near Ilhas, Goa, India. It also caused thousands to flee the island, and led to the closure of Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão in 1859.
Chorão (formerly known as Choddnnem) is an island along the Mandovi River near Tiswadi, Goa, India. It is the largest among other 17 islands of Goa.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Our Lady of Grace Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Our Lady of Grace Church is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Our Lady of Grace Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (15 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Our Lady of Grace Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Our Lady of Grace Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Our Lady of Grace Church?
faq.a: Stays in Our Lady of Grace Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Our Lady of Grace Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Real Colégio de Educação de Chorão, Chapel of St. Jerome (Chorão Island), Salim Ali Bird Sanctuary, Salvador do Mundo, Ribandar.
